caption: A man with a beard, tattoos on his arms, and a shaved head wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a logo that reads "Stay Authentic" and "KID PUNK." He is positioned in front of a dark, textured acoustic foam wall in a recording studio setting. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of him. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his posture; he begins with his right hand resting on the top of his head, then lowers his arm and leans slightly forward. Throughout the clip, he looks toward someone or something off-screen to his right, opening his mouth as if speaking while maintaining a focused expression. The camera remains static, capturing his upper body and the surrounding equipment.
